name: NEAR Protocol SDK
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT/Apache 2.0); NEAR blockchain gas fees for transactions

auth.notes: NEAR account key pair for signing transactions

performance.notes: ~1-2s finality on NEAR mainnet; fast by blockchain standards

agent_readiness.notes: Rust SDK for writing NEAR Protocol smart contracts. Macro-based contract definitions (#[near_bindgen]). Storage abstraction (LookupMap, Vector, etc.). Cross-contract calls. Async execution with promises. WASM compilation target. JavaScript SDK also available (near-sdk-js). NEAR testnet for free testing. Human-readable accounts. Low gas costs vs Ethereum. Fast finality. AI/ML inference use cases on NEAR gaining traction.

gotchas: WASM storage model requires different patterns than standard Rust
Cross-contract async model can be complex
best_when: NEAR Protocol smart contract development in Rust
Social graph applications (NEAR has native social layer)
AI/ML on-chain use cases being explored on NEAR
summary: NEAR Protocol's Rust SDK for smart contract development. Macro-based contracts, WASM compilation, storage abstractions, and cross-contract async calls. Low transaction costs and fast (~1-2s) finality vs Ethereum. NEAR testnet for free testing. Best for NEAR-specific development; smaller ecosystem than Ethereum but growing AI/ML on-chain use cases.
